description: Composition Rust T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chest and brand badge above the left hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low and dry inside-out in shade Warm iron Relive the youthful days of school rockbands with this T-shirt from facit. Crafted from soft, premium cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort, this T-shirt looks great with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
